user.title: Network key
user.description: Set the shared BLE network key used for all timers. Leave empty to generate a random key, or paste an existing key (32 hex characters or Base64).

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect or provision the timer. Put it in pairing mode and try again.
error.verify_failed: Handshake worked but the timer did not return device information. Try again.

add_device.title: Add timer
add_device.description: Put the timer in pairing mode. The address field lists connectable Bluetooth devices Home Assistant sees. The integration provisions with your saved network key and confirms pairing.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect or provision the timer. Put it in pairing mode and try again.
error.verify_failed: Handshake worked but the timer did not return device information. Try again.
